infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: SignLink needs camera access to capture sign language gestures.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: SignLink needs microphone access to record speech and audio for translation.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow SignLink to access your microphone for speech translation.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow SignLink to access your camera for sign language recognition.
plugins.microphonePermission: Allow SignLink to record audio with your videos when needed.
